transcript.text:
[There hasn't been a reaction like this before]
[It's making her dance]
[What's today's menu?]
[Fresh Sea Urchin Roe (Uni)]
[With Steak Tartare]
I'm so happy just by looking at it
[Keep stacking]
[Insane combination]
[Who eats sashimi like this?]
[That's a little too much]
[Way too much]
[Starting now!]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Hannam-dong today
There's this place that I've been wanting to try out
They sell both Sea Urchin Roe (uni) and Steak Tartare

It's a famous drinking place here (bar) Not necessarily a restaurant
Here
[Hannam Misu] [Yongsan-gu, Daesagwan-ro]
Hello~
It appears to be like a family home around the corner
So there aren't many walk-ins Most are from reservations
The spots fill up very fast, so I had to make a reservation today as well
There it is
Uni steak tartare
For the uni steak tartare,
Can 6 orders of that fit on the table?
Of course...
[Calculating]
It can fit up to 8
8 orders by yourself? Do you have more people coming?
-Yes -Alone?!

Then I'll take 8 orders of this to fill up the table
I'll also take the squid ramyun noodles
-You're eating this too? -Yes
Okay...
[Let's stack it up]
[And the last plate]
[Ready to go]
This is a first
This is a little too much
[Here we go]
I'm so happy just by looking at it
Check that out
I think this will be gone really quickly
They gave me this poached egg as a palate cleanser
[A sweet appetizer] In 1 bite, It's my first time trying it
Interesting... Almost like soft tofu

It just melted in my mouth
Really savory
Excuse me,
Can you tell me which sauce is which
How do I eat this?
Pour the sesame oil here
Soy sauce is for the wraps
Salt is if you're eating it plain
Thank you
Don't dip anything for the first ones
Try the taste of its original flavors first
I'm starting to have a headache looking at this
I can maybe eat 2 orders
But this is too much
She said to try its original flavors
Perfection

The scent of the meat is really... Fragrant?
This is Korean beef 2+ grade
The color of uni is beautiful
-You'll be even more surprised by the flavors -Thank you
Sea urchin roe (uni)
That's so meaty
[Touched]
Very sweet
It's really sweet
Uni tend to get fishy easily depending on the quality
But this is sweet!
Let's mix this up
They're all so pretty to eat
So delicious
Let's put this on top Without any sauce
Tasty!

It's only 2 food items, but so many different ways to eat them
Some salt here
[I love it]
Crazy
Uni now
I'm going to try every way to eat them
Soy sauce
What do I do...
I'm so happy
Uni sorbet? Really savory and it melts right away
2 at a time
Uni on top
Let's dip it in egg yolk
[Can't resist but to dance]
All of the savory flavors here
3x

Explosion of flavors
I usually pick out anything and eat whatever
Like 3~5 pieces at a time
I have to try it like that here too
What's going on in my mouth
4 pieces
A bunch on top
I've never been this happy
Egg yolk
I have to balance out the beef and uni
This is 9 pieces of steak tartare
[How much money is this single bite?]
This almost looks like shabu (hot pot) meat
I live for this Literally
I'm going all-in now
Some soy sauce

Bunch of uni this time
Uni tower
Have you seen anything like it?
Who came up with this combination?
This will bring world peace
A bite of this will cool anyone's temper down
[For all the couples out there...]
Egg yolk
Sandwich
Uni on top of it
WIth some wasabi
Cover it
[This is a sandwich?]
Well this is..
It looked good
Until I covered it So let's add another uni

It needs to end with uni toppings
A little bit of salt,
Egg yolk
3 stacks
Say "ah~"
Do you want some?
[Yes, we want some]
Let's make a wrap
Plum juice...
I did see it earlier
[Before she ordered] What is that single plum juice bottle over there?
[Is it mine?]
I've been eyeing that
It's been a while
I can't pour like how I used to with these cups
Lovely

[Spicy squid ramyun noodles]
[With a whole-steamed squid]
Thank you Over here, please
Amazing
-Cut it up using these -Okay, thank you
The visuals... How did they do this?
No guts in here
That looks so good
Is this real life?
Let's add in some uni
And a couple of steak tartare
This is no joke Incredible
[Eye-opening]
Some soup too
Squid makes everything tasty
Wrap it up like this

Some kimchi
This is like tadaki, right? Slightly cooked
Half cooked Rare
Amazing
Tasty!
Eating it like shabu
Oh no!
It's a new shirt...
I always say I won't wear white and end up wearing white
Let's move this aside for a sec
A bite of this
It's very orange as you can see
Sweet
Also,
3 pieces of steak tartare,
1, 2, 3

[Finish it off with wasabi]
Happiness is not too far away
It's very close by
I'm going to dig in
[How many are you putting?]
That looks really good actually
[Reason why we watch mukbang]
Looks really good
It's been said that people who eat well bring good fortune
So I always got scolded by my mom for not eating well
And look at me now
They used to serve it just like this
I love how this looks
[5 at a time?]
This is my tongue
2 pieces of uni stuck together

They're lovers
Just like this
Still really yummy!
It's good by itself
Original flavors
4 pieces
And another 4
Big bites will bring full flavors
Lots of wasabi
I need at least 3 to have a good bite now
Why are all the roes so tasty?
[Thinking of all the seafood with roe]
Why is it like this?
The worst roe/egg that I've ever had was...
Well, it wasn't bad but... Ostrich egg
[Footage from 2020.03]

[Stand stay still]
1 last bite A big bite
Highlight
There's never been anything like it
[Strawberries on the house] Thank you!
When did you finish everything?
We've never seen anything like this in 6~7 years of being here
-Really? -Yes, really
We're giving you this much just for you
I just know you can finish that too
They gave me these on the house They're so pretty
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
